title: DS Case / Issue
description: One case or issue (channel support case, vendor/compliance thread, etc.), attributed to items/brands. Lives in cases/<id>.json. Cross-links to items by DS# and to per-item channel status by case_number.

id.description: Stable id. Use the channel case/ticket number when available (e.g. 'amazon-20917568511'), else an email-derived slug.

source.description: Where it came from: amazon, walmart_1p, walmart_3p, target_plus, bestbuy, tiktok, nocnoc, toysrus, ebay, shopify_f2f, vendor, compliance, internal, other.

case_number.description: The channel's own case/ticket number, if any.

tags.description: Issue + product tags, e.g. compliance, pricing, werCs, safety-docs, listing, returns, inventory.
